step_rationale: Excitatory amino acid dysregulation associated with ischemic cardiomyocyte injury.
mechanism: Excitatory amino-acid dysregulation impairs cardiovascular homoeostasis and contributes to ischemic myocardial injury.

references.title: Relationship between amino acid metabolism and inflammation in coronary heart disease (Review).
A Metabolomics-Based Study on NMDAR-Mediated Mitochondrial Damage through Calcium Overload and ROS Accumulation in Myocardial Infarction.
